originalTitle: Wolfe Research Weighs on West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (WST) Stock
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (NYSE:WST) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Bill Gates. WST stock is up around 14% year-to-date and has gained nearly 50% over the past year. Analysts still see upside potential in the stock. On May 31, Wolfe Research initiated coverage of West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (NYSE:WST) […]
content:
West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (NYSE: WST ) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Bill Gates . WST stock is up around 14% year-to-date and has gained nearly 50% over the past year. Analysts still see upside potential in the stock.

On May 31, Wolfe Research initiated coverage of West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (NYSE:WST) stock with an Outperform rating and a price target of $375. The brokerage based its decision on the company’s business fundamentals and valuation history.

Based on Wolfe Research’s earnings estimates for West Pharmaceutical Services, the price target represents 40 times projected EPS for 2027. According to the firm, WST stock has typically traded around 40 times earnings over the past 15 years.

Additionally, the firm noted that West Pharmaceutical has historically commanded a premium of more than 100% to the S&P 500. Furthermore, the firm pointed out that even when compared with companies in its own sector, West Pharmaceutical’s stock has historically traded at a substantial premium of 75%.

Therefore, Wolfe Research sees its valuation for West Pharmaceutical stock as supported by both historical trading patterns and the outlook for future earnings growth.

West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (NYSE:WST) manufactures packaging and delivery systems for injectable medicines. Its portfolio includes rubber stoppers, seals, plungers, prefilled syringes, and self-injection devices. Pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies use these components to safely store and administer drugs.

While we acknowledge the potential of WST as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. chineseTitle: 沃尔夫研究公司对 West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (WST) 股票构成压力
chineseSummary: 亿万富翁比尔·盖茨认为，西方制药服务公司（纽约证券交易所股票代码：WST）是最值得购买的股票之一。 WST 股票今年迄今上涨了约 14%，去年上涨了近 50%。分析师仍然认为该股有上涨潜力。 5 月 31 日，沃尔夫研究公司 (Wolfe Research) 开始报道 West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (NYSE:WST) […]
chineseContent:
根据亿万富翁比尔盖茨的说法，西方制药服务公司（纽约证券交易所股票代码：WST）是最值得购买的股票之一。 WST 股票今年迄今上涨了约 14%，去年上涨了近 50%。分析师仍然认为该股有上涨潜力。

5 月 31 日，Wolfe Research 开始对 West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (NYSE:WST) 股票进行评级，给予“跑赢大盘”评级，目标价为 375 美元。该券商根据公司的业务基本面和估值历史做出决定。

根据 Wolfe Research 对 West Pharmaceutical Services 的盈利预测，目标价格是 2027 年预计每股收益的 40 倍。该公司表示，过去 15 年，WST 股票的市盈率通常约为 40 倍。

此外，该公司指出，西药集团的股票历史上相对于标准普尔500指数的溢价超过100%。此外，该公司还指出，即使与本行业的公司相比，西药集团的股票历史上也存在75%的大幅溢价。

因此，Wolfe Research 认为其对西部制药股票的估值受到历史交易模式和未来盈利增长前景的支持。

West Pharmaceutical Services Inc（纽约证券交易所股票代码：WST）生产注射药物的包装和输送系统。其产品组合包括橡胶塞、密封件、柱塞、预充式注射器和自注射装置。制药和生物技术公司使用这些组件来安全地储存和管理药物。

虽然我们承认 WST 作为一项投资的潜力，但我们相信某些人工智能股票具有更大的上涨潜力，并且下行风险较小。如果您正在寻找一只被极度低估的人工智能股票，并且该股票也将从特朗普时代的关税和离岸趋势中受益匪浅，请参阅我们关于最佳短期人工智能股票的免费报告。
